title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at IndiaMart Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at IndiaMart Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IndiaMart Advisory Limited:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart Advisory Limited!
